subject: Last Day! Save 50% on a Times Subscription at our Memorial Day Sale
body:
Last Day! Save 50% on a Times Subscription at our Memorial Day Sale

-----------------------------------------------------------------

View in browser:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBThGInB81HXJB86RRNAAwENcGG/viwb?t_params=CAMPAIGN_CODE%3D46JJL%26EMAIL%3Djeeproject%2540yahoo.com%26REGI_ID%3D47275261

-----------------------------------------------------------------

-- THE NEW YORK TIMES --

MEMORIAL DAY SALE

LAST CHANCE TO SAVE 50% FOR 26 WEEKS
ON A TIMES SUBSCRIPTION

ENDS TODAY

REDEEM SPECIAL OFFER:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBThGInB81HXJB86RRNAAwENcGG/sub01

-----------------------------------------------------------------

Dear NYTimes.com Reader, 

Today is the last day to take advantage of big subscription savings. 
Now you can save 50% for a full 26 weeks on any subscription. 

Choose whichever option works best for you: 

An Unlimited Digital subscription gives you unlimited access 
to our in-depth articles, immersive storytelling and innovative 
multimedia, from the world's finest journalists, on NYTimes.com 
and NYTimes mobile apps including the new NYT Now app for iPhone(R). 

Home Delivery is the convenient way to get the unrivaled print 
edition of The Times, first thing in the morning. Your 
subscription includes unlimited access to NYTimes.com and apps 
for your smartphone and tablet including the new NYT Now app. 
Plus get a free additional log in so a friend or family member 
can also enjoy digital access. 

Top Stories is our most affordable subscription and gives you: 
up to 50 of the top stories each day on NYTimes.com; updates 
whenever news breaks; and full access to our new NYT Now app 
featuring our daily briefings. 

Don't miss this opportunity to get exceptional savings on your 
choice of Times subscription. 

ACT NOW! SALE ENDS TODAY*

REDEEM SPECIAL OFFER:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBThGInB81HXJB86RRNAAwENcGG/sub02

*****

All subscriptions include:

-- Inspiring journalism

-- Innovative multimedia

-- Reliable coverage

-- NYT Now

REDEEM SPECIAL OFFER:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBThGInB81HXJB86RRNAAwENcGG/sub03

-----------------------------------------------------------------

*This sale expires on May 28, 2014, 9 a.m. ET. 

This email was sent to you as a registered user on NYTimes.com. 

Mobile apps are not supported on all devices. Does not include 
Times Premier content, e-reader editions or digital versions of 
The New York Times Crossword. Home Delivery promotional offer 
valid for new subscribers in areas served by The New York Times 
Delivery Service. After your introductory period, your 
subscription will continue at the regular rate, unless you notify 
us otherwise. State and local taxes will be added where applicable. 
Other restrictions apply. 

Apple and the Apple logo are trademarks of Apple Inc., registered in 
the U.S. and other countries. iPhone is a trademark of Apple Inc.

To ensure delivery of e-mails from The New York Times, please
add nytimes@e.newyorktimesinfo.com to your address book.

The New York Times:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBThGInB81HXJB86RRNAAwENcGG/nyt

Privacy Policy:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBThGInB81HXJB86RRNAAwENcGG/privacy

Contact Us:
help@nytimes.com

Unsubscribe:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBThGInB81HXJB86RRNAAwENcGG/unsub?email=jeeproject@yahoo.com&REGI_ID=47275261

Last Day! Save 50% on a Times Subscription at our Memorial Day Sale
View in browser

Dear NYTimes.com Reader,

Today is the last day to take advantage of big subscription savings. Now you can save 50% for a full 26 weeks on any subscription.

Choose whichever option works best for you:

An Unlimited Digital subscription gives you unlimited access to our in-depth articles, immersive storytelling and innovative multimedia, from the world’s finest journalists, on NYTimes.com and NYTimes mobile apps including the new NYT Now app for iPhone®.

Home Delivery is the convenient way to get the unrivaled print edition of The Times, first thing in the morning. Your subscription includes unlimited access to NYTimes.com and apps for your smartphone and tablet including the new NYT Now app. Plus get a free additional log in so a friend or family member can also enjoy digital access.

Top Stories is our most affordable subscription and gives you: up to 50 of the top stories each day on NYTimes.com; updates whenever news breaks; and full access to our new NYT Now app featuring our daily briefings.

Don’t miss this opportunity to get exceptional savings on your choice of Times subscription.

ACT NOW! SALE ENDS TODAY!*


This email was sent to you as a registered user on NYTimes.com.

*This sale expires on May 28, 2014, 9 a.m. ET.

Mobile apps are not supported on all devices. Does not include Times Premier content, e-reader editions or digital versions of The New York Times Crossword. Home Delivery promotional offer valid for new subscribers in areas served by The New York Times Delivery Service. After your introductory period, your subscription will continue at the regular rate, unless you notify us otherwise. State and local taxes will be added where applicable. Other restrictions apply.
